full_text:
Jia Long 賈龍
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jia Long (賈龍)was born in Jianwei. Raised a force to defeat Yellow Turbans in Shu but was later killed by Liu Yan. Jia Long was affiliated with Liu Yan, Dong Zhuo, and the Han Dynasty. Jia Long lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
